tasks.title: Define PostgreSQL schema for users and news articles
Implement Telegram bot command handling and message sending
Integrate NewsAPI for fetching Tech/Science headlines

Handle unknown commands and invalid inputs with error messages
Verify end-to-end flow from subscription to digest delivery
